configurations.name: Dharma AI (FastAPI + frontend)
runtimeArgs: import sys, os; sys.path = [p for p in sys.path if p] + ['/tmp/godai_backend']; [os.environ.setdefault(k.strip(), v.strip()) for line in open('/tmp/godai.env') for k, _, v in [line.partition('=')] if k.strip() and not k.startswith('#')]; import uvicorn; uvicorn.run('app.main:app', host='127.0.0.1', port=8080)

configurations.name: Docker Compose (full stack: app + MongoDB + Caddy)
